dialogos.texto_en: Hmm? Is that Ichika?
Oh no?!
Huh?\nHey, why are you running away?!
Ichika, it's okay.\nThat was Futaro.
Eh? Was it really?
Look.
Oh, it IS Futaro-kun.\nI got startled when you suddenly called out to me.
I was the one who was surprised.\nYou suddenly ran away,\nand I thought something had happened.
Sorry, sorry, it was just a little bit of a fuss before.
What's wrong, did something happen?
Oh, earlier I caused a little commotion.
The people around us noticed that she's an actress.
Ahh, I get it.\nYou're disguising yourself with glasses\nso that you won't be recognized and approached.
Yeah, that's right.\nYou recognized me right away though, right?
Well, with this much experience,\nI should be able to.\nBesides, I've seen you wearing glasses before.
Right, it was around the time\nyour movie was featured on TV,\nand you tasted a little fame.
Hmm, so you remember that.
Why don't you change your hairstyle while you're at it?
Well, no, I can't change my hairstyle to that extent.\nI don't have a wig with me now.
At times like this,\nI envy you, Miku. You can change your look\nwith just your hairstyle.
Is that so?
Hm?
You didn't even react when I changed my hairstyle,\nFutaro.
Huh? When was that?
...You remember Ichika's glasses,\nbut you don't remember my hair.
Was it when we stayed at your grandfather's\nhot spring inn?\nI think it was Itsuki that you%p-2;――
You're completely wrong.\nThat was a disguise.
Th-that's right!\nAt the school festival,\nyou were working behind the scenes, right?
...Wrong again.
Actually, I only ever paid attention to your hairstyles \nwhen I was trying to tell you apart.
Hey, Futaro-kun? That's actually not a good thing.\nWhen a girl changes her hairstyle,\nyou have to praise her, at least.
...Hm?\nI feel like I've been told that before.
I think that was...
Oh, I remember now. It was when I went to the fireworks\nfestival with you guys. Miku, you changed your hair,\nand someone else mistook you for Ichika, right?
You finally remembered.
Miku, that hairstyle on you was really cute, wasn't it?
Things were so chaotic at the time...\nI can't remember what kind of hairstyle it was...
Mmmh...
Futaro-kun?\nWere you actually listening to what I was just saying?
Well, if I don't remember,\nthere's nothing I can do about it.
Then, let's try something.\nMiku, could you hold still for a moment?
Huh? Wha... Ichika?
Okay, okay, this should do it.\nAnd I'll lend you this, too.
Here you go, it's done!\nI think you've changed your appearance quite a bit.
I'm not too sure of myself.\nFutaro, what do you think?
Don't ask me.
Well, I guess it's different from the usual Miku.
What? Is that it?
Well, it is Futaro, so that's how it is.
I was expecting a little more, though.
Hmm, it suits you, doesn't it?
Why are you asking in a questioning tone...
Are you trying to compliment her with that?
Well, that was my intention.
There could be a better way to put it, I think.
Futaro-kun, you might have tried your best,\nbut that's only worth a measly 50 percent score.
Harsh...
Alright, let's just go back to the way it was.
Well, it's Futaro-kun after all.\nI guess this is how it is.
It's not like it doesn't suit her, but...\nI prefer the usual Miku.
Huh?
Ohh?\nFutaro-kun is straightforward with his words, for once.
W-well, I just thought that way.
Ah, that's right!\nIf you change your hairstyle,\nI've gotta praise it, right?!
Nah.\nYou don't have to force yourself to compliment me.
Is that so?
Futaro says that he prefers the usual Miku.\nThat's enough for me.
Let's just go back to the way it was.\nThank you, Ichika.
After all, my usual hairstyle is the most comfortable.
Hey, I guess I feel more at ease\nseeing the familiar look too.
Futaro-kun is the type who,\nspeaking positively,\ndoesn't care much about appearances, huh.
There's no particular reason to care.\nIf I had to say, I'd just prefer you not to be sloppy.
Is what he says.
Huh?\nI wonder who he could be referring to?
That's right. I know someone like that real close by.
Wow, you're horrible.
But you know, when you fall in love,\nthose kind of things can become cute to you.
No, that's not true.
Can't be.
Well. It. Is.
If you don't believe me,\nshall I make you experience it?
Wha?!\nWhat does that mean...
Ichika, you're too close to Futaro.
If you ever feel like it, just say so, 'kay?
(Is she joking or being serious...\nWhich one is it?)
